confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_0d7d6386-974e-4c07-af90-a55113d7428f read back as promoted

clarification.reason: If onboarding remains prose-only, Narada cannot reliably ask numbered choices, resume after interruption, compute missing capability readiness, record deferred choices, or prevent architect-memory drift.

expected_capabilities_enabled_by_structu: Generate numbered/lettered Operator questions from the cascade.
Persist answers and deferred choices as state or decisions.
Resume onboarding from the next unanswered material choice.
Compute readiness by layer: structural Site, selected capabilities, credentials, dry-run proof, activation, runtime installation, live health.
Generate or recommend CLI commands from chosen branches.
Detect that a Site is structurally ready but capability-incomplete.
Compare onboarding posture across Sites without relying on prose interpretation.
Evolve onboarding contracts through governed data migrations rather than undocumented architect behavior.
requested_execution: Amend the cascading onboarding proposal/docs to say the canonical cascade is structured data first.
Create an initial narada.onboarding_cascade.v0 schema or example artifact for client-service Sites.
Ensure CLI onboarding uses this artifact rather than hardcoded question order or prose-only instructions.

suggested_shape.site_local_projection: Each Site may store its selected cascade version, answers, deferred choices, and readiness projection in Site-local governed files.

payload.summary: Follow-up to the cascading onboarding proposal: the onboarding cascade should be encoded as machine-readable governed structure, such as JSON or YAML, with prose documentation derived from or explaining that structure. It should not live only as prose guidance for architects.
payload.title: Clarify cascading onboarding should be governed structured data, not prose-only documentation
